rationale.R1.6: The writing is polished but not to the extent of a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is present but could be more explicit.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is mostly within the agreed scope, with one minor drift.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not fully addressed, as there are potential errors in grasping smaller items.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability could be improved by providing more detailed information on source and reason.
